steps.title: Track the purchase-site data
steps.content: After free Deezer streaming was capped, affected listeners visited licensed and unlicensed music-download sites about 2% less. The conclusion must explain that lower streaming access was associated with reduced interest in obtaining music.

steps.title: Remove unsupported outcomes
steps.content: Choice A is about total Deezer users, which the study does not measure. Choice C speculates about premium subscriptions. Choice D focuses only on physical copies, while the study concerns purchase and download sites. The data instead links streaming restrictions to less ownership-seeking behavior. The answer is B.
